Vaz

I started out building bots just for fun, but that quickly turned into a full-time gig making apps and digital tools. Lately, I spend most of my time connecting different apps and APIs—mostly making things that link up community features, Roblox stuff, and handy scripts.

My Projects

Nora Bot

Nora is a modern Discord moderation and AI assistant bot designed around one simple rule: server data belongs to the server that created it. Integrated with custom Aura V10 AI engine, automated anti-raid shield, leveling system, and Roblox rank verification.

Open Nora

More Projects

Future tools, utilities, and security applications are currently under active design and development. Stay tuned for future releases.
